description: The Data & Context settings pane mixes too many related but distinct tasks into one continuous surface.
expected: Users should be able to work on instructions, memory, MCP, or hooks without mentally parsing a control center.
actual: Instructions, Memory, MCP, Hooks, Event Reference, and Execution Log all appear in one dense pane.
suggested_fix: Split the pane into narrower subsections or add progressive disclosure for the lower-frequency sections.

description: Repeated headings such as `Memory` and `Hooks` make the already dense pane feel less structured.
expected: Section headings should clarify structure and reduce scan effort.
actual: The pane visibly repeats section headings, which makes the hierarchy feel stacked rather than grouped.
suggested_fix: Tighten heading hierarchy and avoid repeated section labels unless they represent clearly separate subsections.
